tasks.title: Create InterventionScorer class
tasks.description: Rule-based scoring engine: VAD state, turn dynamics, question detection, cooldown timer. Configurable weights and threshold.

tasks.title: Wire VAD events into scorer
tasks.description: In main.ts, subscribe to VAD speech start/end events and feed them to the scorer. Track human speech state and silence duration.

tasks.title: Replace blind follow-up logic
tasks.description: Refactor setupFollowUpTurns to consult InterventionScorer before triggering generateReply. Skip turn if score below threshold.

tasks.title: Add intervention config to metadata
tasks.description: Extend ArenaMetadata with optional intervention config (weights, threshold, cooldown). Pass from backend via room metadata.

tasks.title: Add intervention thresholds to provider config
tasks.description: Default weights and thresholds in provider-config.ts for easy tuning.

tasks.title: Intervention decision logging
tasks.description: Log every intervention decision (score, components, outcome) for future ML training data.
